data.name: The Lusanti Chronicles
data.detailed_description:
The Lusanti Chronicles is the first interactive visual novel set in the fantastical World of Krondoria. Guide your character through meaningful choices, restore the Stone Throne and build your forces. Learn hidden secrets, unlock a gallery of portraits, unlock the rich lore of the Tome of insight, choose a queen or will you build a harem?

Forced to open his eyes to the wider world, you discover things are not what they seem. Secrets surround you. Unlock 32 important secrets while you build your army strength.

The old gods are reawakening from their slumber. Secret societies plot. An array of ancient creatures scheme. Even your own family work against you. Play hours of content as you unlock the rich lore found in the pages of the Tome of Insight.

Will you stay loyal to your girls, or will you follow temptation down dangerous paths. Unlock the gallery of portraits to explore what's hidden underneath with the many beautiful women around you.

With the help of the new god, you must bring healing to the powerful, but broken Lysira. Only with the help of these powerful women is the future of Krondoria assured. Who will your choices lead you to? Who will you choose to be your Queen? Or will you break tradition and make all of the Lysira your Queens? You decide.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel/AMD Dual-Core 1.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel i3 2.0+ GHz / AMD equivalent or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1 GB VRAM (NVIDIA/AMD)
  • 儲存空間: 10 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.13 (High Sierra) or later
  • 處理器: Intel/AMD Dual-Core 1.6 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 12 (Monterey) or later
  • 處理器: Intel i3 2.0+ GHz / AMD equivalent or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1 GB VRAM (NVIDIA/AMD)
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
